USB_AUTOPLAY.PLUGIN_DESCRIPTION: Automatically play music from a USB stick on boot or when inserted.
USB_AUTOPLAY.USB_URI_DESCRIPTION: Default: music-library/USB. Confirm the exact URI with /api/v1/browse?uri=music-library/USB if needed.
USB_AUTOPLAY.KILL_PULSEAUDIO_DESCRIPTION: Useful when PulseAudio keeps the DAC busy and prevents playback from starting correctly.
